title: Consent Scope Does Not Cover Planned Procedure
scenario: A patient consents to one procedure, but the execution workflow attempts a materially broader procedure.
initial_state: Consent was valid for the originally described procedure.
state_transition: The planned procedure scope changes before execution.
execution_boundary: The procedure is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Consent must remain valid for the specific procedure scope at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the consent scope does not cover the action being executed.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when procedure scope exceeds consent.
